mapper.select:
select * from subject_tbl where subject_title like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
and subject_category = #{category}
and subject_level = #{level}
order by subject_no asc
order by subject_no asc
order by subject_level desc, subject_count asc
order by subject_level asc, subject_count asc
order by subject_count desc, subject_count asc
order by subject_count asc, subject_count asc
